annotations.label: Covering / covering space
annotations.note: `IsCoveringMap f` requires every point to have an evenly covered neighborhood with discrete fiber, matching the Wikipedia definition.

annotations.label: Sheets of a covering
annotations.note: The components of the preimage in an evenly covered neighborhood are not given a name in Mathlib's `IsEvenlyCovered` setup.

annotations.label: Fiber of a covering
annotations.note: The fiber is just `f ⁻¹' {x}` in Mathlib with no dedicated name, but `IsEvenlyCovered.fiberHomeomorph` shows it is homeomorphic to the discrete model fiber.

annotations.label: Connected covering is surjective with constant fiber cardinality

anchor.snippet: is surjective, and the cardinality of

annotations.note: Mathlib has no named lemma stating that a covering of a connected non-empty base is surjective with constant fiber cardinality.

annotations.label: Degree of a covering

anchor.snippet: this value is called the degree of the covering

annotations.note: Mathlib has no defined `degree` of a covering map as a numerical invariant.

annotations.label: Path-connected covering
annotations.note: The notion `IsCoveringMap f ∧ PathConnectedSpace E` is not packaged as a named definition.

annotations.label: Covering equivalent to locally trivial fiber bundle

anchor.snippet: This definition is equivalent to the statement that

annotations.note: `IsFiberBundle.isCoveringMap` gives one direction and `IsEvenlyCovered.toTrivialization` gives the other, establishing equivalence between coverings and discrete-fiber fiber bundles.

annotations.label: Trivial covering
annotations.note: No specific lemma asserts that the identity / a homeomorphism is a covering map, though it follows from `IsCoveringMap.of_discreteTopology` only on discrete spaces.

annotations.label: Trivial n-sheeted covering

anchor.snippet: the covering is called the trivial

annotations.note: No lemma states that the projection `X × F → X` for discrete `F` is a covering as a named example.

annotations.label: Exponential covering of the unit circle

anchor.snippet: is a covering of the unit circle

annotations.note: `AddCircle.isCoveringMap_coe` (and `Complex.isCoveringMap_exp`) formalize the universal exponential covering of the circle.

annotations.label: n-fold covering of the unit circle

anchor.snippet: Another covering of the unit circle

annotations.note: Multiplication by `n` on `AddCircle p` is a covering map via `isAddQuotientCoveringMap_zsmul`; complex `z ↦ z^n` is handled by `isCoveringMap_npow`.

annotations.label: Local homeomorphism that is not a covering

anchor.snippet: A map which is a local homeomorphism but not a covering

annotations.note: No specific counterexample of a non-covering local homeomorphism is recorded.

annotations.label: Double covering for odd n
annotations.note: The double covering `S^n → RP^n` is not formalized in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Covering is a local homeomorphism
annotations.note: `IsCoveringMap.isLocalHomeomorph` directly states that any covering map is a local homeomorphism.

annotations.label: Orientation double cover of non-orientable manifold
annotations.note: Mathlib does not yet have orientation double cover constructions.

annotations.label: Covering of a connected Lie group is a Lie group
annotations.note: No statement transferring Lie group structure along a covering map exists in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Covering of a graph is a graph
annotations.note: Mathlib has no topological graph theory of this kind; `Quiver.Covering` is purely combinatorial.

annotations.label: Universal cover of connected manifold
annotations.note: Universal covers of manifolds are not constructed in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Universal cover of connected Riemann surface
annotations.note: No Riemann surface theory exists in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Factorisation of coverings (first)
annotations.note: No composition lemma for `IsCoveringMap` exists; `IsCoveringMap.comp` is absent.

annotations.label: Factorisation of coverings (second)
annotations.note: The cancellation form for covering factorisations is not in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Product of coverings is a covering
annotations.note: No `Prod`-style lemma about `IsCoveringMap` exists in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Equivalent coverings / isomorphic covering spaces
annotations.note: Mathlib has no equivalence relation on covering maps.

annotations.label: Lifting property of coverings

anchor.snippet: All coverings satisfy the lifting property

annotations.note: The full lifting criterion (Hatcher 1.33) is `existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts_of_range_le`; the homotopy lifting property is `liftHomotopy`.

annotations.label: Lift of path and homotopy

anchor.snippet: is a lift of a path in

annotations.note: `IsCoveringMap.liftPath` (with `exists_path_lifts`) and `liftHomotopy` give unique lifts of paths and homotopies.

annotations.label: Fundamental group of the unit circle is infinite cyclic
annotations.note: Mathlib does not yet compute π₁(S¹) ≅ ℤ; no grep hits for fundamental group of circle.

annotations.label: Path lift gives bijection between fibers
annotations.note: `IsCoveringMap.monodromy_bijective` states the monodromy along a homotopy class is a bijection between fibers.

annotations.label: Induced homomorphism on fundamental group is injective
annotations.note: `IsCoveringMap.injective_path_homotopic_map` proves the induced map on fundamental groupoid Hom-sets (in particular π₁) is injective.

annotations.label: Holomorphic map between Riemann surfaces
annotations.note: Mathlib has no Riemann surface formalization; the relevant `RiemannSurface` type does not exist.

annotations.label: Holomorphic map (global)
annotations.note: Global holomorphic maps between Riemann surfaces are not formalized.

annotations.label: Local expression of a holomorphic map

anchor.snippet: is called the local expression of

annotations.note: No notion of `local expression` of a holomorphic map between Riemann surfaces exists.

annotations.label: Non-constant holomorphic map between compact Riemann surfaces is surjective and open

anchor.snippet: is surjective and an open map

annotations.note: Not in Mathlib; no Riemann surface theory.

annotations.label: Ramification index, ramification point, branch point

anchor.snippet: is called the ramification index of

annotations.note: No ramification index for holomorphic maps between Riemann surfaces is defined in Mathlib (only number-theoretic ramification indices).

annotations.label: Degree of a holomorphic map

anchor.snippet: is the cardinality of the fiber of an unramified point

annotations.note: Degree of a holomorphic map between Riemann surfaces is not defined.

annotations.label: Degree is well-defined
annotations.note: Without the degree definition there is no well-definedness lemma.

annotations.label: Branched covering
annotations.note: Mathlib has no `BranchedCover` definition.

annotations.label: Branched covering of degree n

anchor.snippet: is a branched covering of degree

annotations.note: Not formalized as branched covering, though `isCoveringMap_npow` covers the unramified locus.

annotations.label: Non-constant holomorphic map is a branched covering

anchor.snippet: Every non-constant, holomorphic map between compact Riemann surfaces

annotations.note: Not formalized; requires Riemann surface and branched cover infrastructure.

annotations.label: Universal covering

anchor.snippet: denoted as the universal covering of the space

annotations.note: Universal covers are not constructed in Mathlib (no `universalCover` declaration).

annotations.label: Universal cover unique up to equivalence

anchor.snippet: there exists a uniquely determined homeomorphism

annotations.note: The uniqueness-of-universal-cover statement is not formalized in Mathlib (no universal cover construction).

annotations.label: Existence of universal covering

anchor.snippet: connected, locally simply connected topological space

annotations.note: Existence of the universal cover is not formalized; `LocallySimplyConnected` doesn't exist either.

annotations.label: Fundamental group acts freely on universal cover
annotations.note: Not in Mathlib without a universal cover construction.

annotations.label: Universal covering of the unit circle

anchor.snippet: is the universal covering of the unit circle

annotations.note: The covering map ℝ → S¹ is formalized, but its universality (as the universal cover) is not asserted.

annotations.label: Universal covering of projective space

anchor.snippet: is the universal covering of the projective space

annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Universal covering of the unitary group

anchor.snippet: is the universal covering of the unitary group

annotations.note: Not formalized.

anchors.snippet: is the universal covering of the unitary group

annotations.label: Quotient map as universal covering

anchor.snippet: it follows that the quotient map

annotations.note: Universality of quotient covers is not stated.

anchors.snippet: it follows that the quotient map

annotations.label: Hawaiian earring has no universal covering

anchor.snippet: A topological space which has no universal covering is the Hawaiian earring

annotations.note: The Hawaiian earring is not defined in Mathlib (no grep hits).

anchors.snippet: A topological space which has no universal covering is the Hawaiian earring

annotations.label: Fundamental groupoid of orbit space

anchor.snippet: the fundamental groupoid of the orbit space

annotations.note: The action groupoid description of π₁ of an orbit space is not in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Smooth covering
annotations.note: No `SmoothCovering` concept exists in Mathlib (only the topological `IsCoveringMap`).

annotations.label: Deck transformation

anchor.snippet: A deck transformation is a homeomorphism

annotations.note: Deck transformations are not defined in Mathlib (no `DeckTransformation` symbol).

annotations.label: Regular (normal/Galois) cover
annotations.note: Regular/normal/Galois covers are not defined; only `IsQuotientCoveringMap` is the closest related concept.

annotations.label: Regular cover is a principal G-bundle

anchor.snippet: Every such regular cover is a principal

annotations.note: Principal bundles are not defined in Mathlib for this purpose.

annotations.label: Universal cover is regular with deck group equal to fundamental group
annotations.note: Not formalized without universal cover or deck transformations.

annotations.label: Deck transformations of the exponential cover
annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Deck transformations of the n-fold cover
annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Punctured plane regular cover
annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Deck transformations permute fibers freely

anchor.snippet: it permutes the elements of a fiber

annotations.note: No deck transformation theory in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Normal covering
annotations.note: Normal coverings are not defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Normal covering iff normal subgroup
annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Deck transformation group of a normal covering
annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Deck transformation group via normalizer
annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Discontinuous group action
annotations.note: `ProperlyDiscontinuousSMul` captures the standard notion of properly discontinuous group action used for covering quotients.

annotations.label: Quotient by discontinuous action is normal covering
annotations.note: Quotient by a properly discontinuous free action is shown to be an `IsQuotientCoveringMap` (hence a covering), but not labelled as a normal cover.

annotations.label: Normal coverings of the circle

anchor.snippet: is a normal coverings for every

annotations.note: The circle's coverings are formalized but not marked as normal.

annotations.label: Simply connected covering is normal

anchor.snippet: Every simply connected covering is a normal covering

annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Path-connected quotient: fundamental group calculation
annotations.note: The π₁ computation for path-connected quotients is not in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Simply connected quotient: fundamental group is G
annotations.note: Not formalized; no theorem π₁(X/G) ≅ G for free discontinuous G-action on simply connected X.

annotations.label: Antipodal map and fundamental group of sphere
annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Universal covering of SO(n)
annotations.note: Not formalized (no Spin group covering SO(n)).

annotations.note: Klein bottle universal cover is not formalized.

annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.note: Not formalized.

annotations.label: Galois correspondence bijection

annotations.note: The Galois correspondence for covering spaces is not formalized in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Degree of covering equals index of subgroup
annotations.note: Not formalized (no degree definition either).

annotations.label: Category of coverings
annotations.note: No category of covering maps is constructed in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Category of G-sets

anchor.snippet: is the category of sets which are G-sets

annotations.note: `Action (Type) G` realises the category of G-sets as a special case of the general `Action V G` construction.

annotations.label: Equivalence of categories: coverings and G-sets
annotations.note: The equivalence between coverings of X and π₁(X)-sets is not formalized.

annotations.label: SO(3) is RP³ with Spin(3) = S³ as universal cover

anchor.snippet: Topologically, SO(3) is the real projective space

annotations.note: The homeomorphism SO(3) ≅ RP³ and its double cover by S³ ≅ Spin(3) (via unit quaternions) is not formalized in Mathlib.
